AREV.justification: The attempt to reverse the asymmetry back to a neutral state.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identification of the state as specifically soft chiral.

EVALT.justification: The successful establishment of a soft temporal asymmetry.

EVALF.justification: The failure to maintain asymmetry due to lack of memory.

ENGAGR.justification: A state where both chiralities exist simultaneously without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent record of the kick value in the Lean environment.
